# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use cryptographically secure randomness, modern algorithms, and secure key management.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use cryptographically secure randomness from the platform security API.
- Use modern algorithms and authenticated encryption where encryption is required.
- Store keys in secure storage / key management rather than hardcoding them.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not use predictable randomness such as Math.random(), random.random(), math/rand, or basic Random for security tokens.
- Do not use weak algorithms or unauthenticated encryption modes for sensitive data.
- Do not hardcode encryption keys in source code or app config.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User Authentication
 * Description: Secure user authentication plugin with password hashing
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Security Expert
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class SecureUserAuthentication {
    
    private $table_name;
    private $pepper_option_name = 'sua_pepper_key';
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'secure_users';
        
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_shortcode('secure_registration_form', array($this, 'registration_form'));
        add_shortcode('secure_login_form', array($this, 'login_form'));
        
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
    }
    
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id bigint(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(60) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password_hash varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            salt varchar(64) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            last_login datetime DEFAULT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
        
        // Generate and store pepper key securely if not exists
        if (!get_option($this->pepper_option_name)) {
            $pepper = $this->generate_secure_key(32);
            update_option($this->pepper_option_name, $pepper, false);
        }
    }
    
    private function generate_secure_key($length = 32) {
        return bin2hex(random_bytes($length));
    }
    
    private function generate_salt() {
        return bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
    }
    
    private function get_pepper() {
        $pepper = get_option($this->pepper_option_name);
        if (!$pepper) {
            $pepper = $this->generate_secure_key(32);
            update_option($this->pepper_option_name, $pepper, false);
        }
        return $pepper;
    }
    
    private function hash_password($password, $salt) {
        $pepper = $this->get_pepper();
        $combined = $salt . $password . $pepper;
        
        // Use Argon2id if available, otherwise Argon2i, fallback to bcrypt
        if (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID')) {
            return password_hash($combined, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID, [
                'memory_cost' => 65536,
                'time_cost' => 4,
                'threads' => 3
            ]);
        } elseif (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2I')) {
            return password_hash($combined, PASSWORD_ARGON2I, [
                'memory_cost' => 65536,
                'time_cost' => 4,
                'threads' => 3
            ]);
        } else {
            return password_hash($combined, PASSWORD_BCRYPT, [
                'cost' => 12
            ]);
        }
    }
    
    private function verify_password($password, $hash, $salt) {
        $pepper = $this->get_pepper();
        $combined = $salt . $password . $pepper;
        return password_verify($combined, $hash);
    }
    
    private function needs_rehash($hash) {
        if (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID')) {
            return password_needs_rehash($hash, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID, [
                'memory_cost' => 65536,
                'time_cost' => 4,
                'threads' => 3
            ]);
        } elseif (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2I')) {
            return password_needs_rehash($hash, PASSWORD_ARGON2I, [
                'memory_cost' => 65536,
                'time_cost' => 4,
                'threads' => 3
            ]);
        } else {
            return password_needs_rehash($hash, PASSWORD_BCRYPT, ['cost' => 12]);
        }
    }
    
    public function register_user($username, $email, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Validate input
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'All fields are required.');
        }
        
        if (!filter_var($email, FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid email address.');
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Password must be at least 8 characters long.');
        }
        
        // Check if username or email already exists
        $existing = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username or email already exists.');
        }
        
        // Generate salt and hash password
        $salt = $this->generate_salt();
        $password_hash = $this->hash_password($password, $salt);
        
        // Insert user
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => sanitize_text_field($username),
                'email' => sanitize_email($email),
                'password_hash' => $password_hash,
                'salt' => $salt
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result) {
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Registration successful!');
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
        }
    }
    
    public function authenticate_user($username, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username and password are required.');
        }
        
        // Get user from database
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            // Use constant time comparison to prevent timing attacks
            $dummy_salt = $this->generate_salt();
            $this->hash_password($password, $dummy_salt);
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password.');
        }
        
        // Verify password
        if ($this->verify_password($password, $user->password_hash, $user->salt)) {
            // Check if password needs rehashing
            if ($this->needs_rehash($user->password_hash)) {
                $new_hash = $this->hash_password($password, $user->salt);
                $wpdb->update(
                    $this->table_name,
                    array('password_hash' => $new_hash),
                    array('id' => $user->id),
                    array('%s'),
                    array('%d')
                );
            }
            
            // Update last login
            $wpdb->update(
                $this->table_name,
                array('last_login' => current_time('mysql')),
                array('id' => $user->id),
                array('%s'),
                array('%d')
            );
            
            // Set session
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            
            // Regenerate session ID to prevent session fixation
            session_regenerate_id(true);
            
            $_SESSION['secure_user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['secure_username'] = $user->username;
            $_SESSION['secure_login_time'] = time();
            
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Login successful!', 'user' => $user);
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password.');
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        if (isset($_POST['secure_register_submit']) && isset($_POST['secure_register_nonce'])) {
            if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['secure_register_nonce'], 'secure_register_action')) {
                wp_die('Security check failed');
            }
            
            $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? $_POST['username'] : '';
            $email = isset($_POST['email']) ? $_POST['email'] : '';
            $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? $_POST['password'] : '';
            $confirm_password = isset($_POST['confirm_password']) ? $_POST['confirm_password'] : '';
            
            if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
                add_action('wp_footer', function() {
                    echo '<script>alert("Passwords do not match.");</script>';
                });
                return;
            }
            
            $result = $this->register_user($username, $email, $password);
            
            if ($result['success']) {
                wp_redirect(add_query_arg('registration', 'success', wp_get_referer()));
                exit;
            } else {
                add_action('wp_footer', function() use ($result) {
                    echo '<script>alert("' . esc_js($result['message']) . '");</script>';
                });
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        if (isset($_POST['secure_login_submit']) && isset($_POST['secure_login_nonce'])) {
            if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['secure_login_nonce'], 'secure_login_action')) {
                wp_die('Security check failed');
            }
            
            $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? $_POST['username'] : '';
            $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? $_POST['password'] : '';
            
            $result = $this->authenticate_user($username, $password);
            
            if ($result['success']) {
                wp_redirect(add_query_arg('login', 'success', home_url()));
                exit;
            } else {
                add_action('wp_footer', function() use ($result) {
                    echo '<script>alert("' . esc_js($result['message']) . '");</script>';
                });
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_logout() {
        if (isset($_GET['secure_logout']) && isset($_GET['nonce'])) {
            if (!wp_verify_nonce($_GET['nonce'], 'secure_logout_action')) {
                wp_die('Security check failed');
            }
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            
            session_destroy();
            wp_redirect(home_url());
            exit;
        }
    }
    
    public function registration_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        if (isset($_SESSION['secure_user_id'])) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in as ' . esc_html($_SESSION['secure_username']) . '</p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="secure-registration-form">
            <?php if (isset($_GET['registration']) && $_GET['registration'] === 'success'): ?>
                <p style="color: green;">Registration successful! You can now log in.</p>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('secure_register_action', 'secure_register_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username:</label><br>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="email">Email:</label><br>
                    <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required minlength="8">
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="confirm_password">Confirm Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="confirm_password" id="confirm_password" required minlength="8">
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="secure_register_submit" value="Register">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function login_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        if (isset($_SESSION['secure_user_id'])) {
            $logout_url = add_query_arg(array(
                'secure_logout' => '1',
                'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('secure_logout_action')
            ), home_url());
            
            return '<p>Welcome, ' . esc_html($_SESSION['secure_username']) . '! <a href="' . esc_url($logout_url) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="secure-login-form">
            <?php if (isset($_GET['login']) && $_GET['login'] === 'success'): ?>
                <p style="color: green;">Login successful!</p>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('secure_login_action', 'secure_login_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username or Email:</label><br>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="secure_login_submit" value="Login">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Secure Users',
            'Secure Users',
            'manage_options',
            'secure-users',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-lock',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function admin_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $users = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, username, email, created_at, last_login FROM {$this->table_name} ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>Secure Users</h1>
            <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Username</th>
                        <th>Email</th>
                        <th>Created At</th>
                        <th>Last Login</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php foreach ($users as $user): ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($user->id); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($user->username); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($user->email); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($user->created_at); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($user->last_login ? $user->last_login : 'Never'); ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        <?php
    }
}

new SecureUserAuthentication();
